text.text: The dragon egg knows that to be born, it must be dead. However, Brahypno used its arguably malicious skill to birth the consciousness of the dragon egg. Never able to die, never able to be born. The endless hatred of the dragon egg was used by Brahypno to create the Ashen Heater. Its heat is enough to replace fuel.
Temperature per block could be config
Ashen Heater can only be used for the floor of the transmute.
